series_metadata.series_description: Consists of documents related to the financial responsibility security deposit process (in accordance with ORC 4509.12), i.e. correspondence, reports, documentation, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: case is resolved and all money has been distributed or refunded. ; Microform: case is resolved and all money has been distributed or refunded. Effective July 2006, these records are no longer being microfilmed. Eventually all microfilmed records will be destroyed. ; Electronic: case is resolved and all money has been distributed or refunded
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
